title: Compound-scaled tyre age
summary: Normalize tyre age by compound durability rather than relying on raw `TyreLife`.
rationale: Raw tyre age is not comparable across SOFT, MEDIUM, HARD, INTERMEDIATE, and WET. The run consistently retained compound expected-life ratios in stronger branches.
implementation_hint: Map each compound to expected life, then add tyre-life-to-expected-life ratio, remaining expected life, over-expected-life amount, old-for-compound flags, and interactions with race phase.
expected_effect: Medium ROC AUC gain with high confidence.
risk: Constants are approximate; make the ratio robust to missing compounds and preserve the raw compound category.
